transcript: Well, we really didn't take the thing very seriously until the Chinese sent in a sort of, you might say, ultimatum because they have been talking about this frontier. a fortification which really doesn't exist. But when they did send in the ultimatum, we were rather worried. Well, once not really quite sure what they were trying to do, we do not believe that they really meant actually big business because apart from the troops that they had in in this part of the world, they're very dependent on the USSR for oil. So I don't think they meant an all out war. So one assumes that it is to tie down Indian troops in actually this part of the world from
